description_long: This object is a medium-sized utility knife featuring a straight, pointed blade made of dark metal, ideal for precise cutting tasks. The blade is single-edged and tapers to a sharp tip, with a smooth, unadorned surface. The handle is crafted from a warm brown material, likely wood or plastic, and is ergonomically contoured for a comfortable grip. The handle has a subtle curvature and a slightly bulbous end, providing stability and control during use. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or ornamentation present.
description: A straight-bladed utility knife with a dark metal blade and a contoured brown handle, designed for practical cutting tasks. The design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade and the contoured brown handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow blade tip and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: Handle-end view showing the width of the handle and the alignment of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, brown, smooth, ergonomic, no visible texture
